narrative:
Lee Township (precinct in Athens County) has 1,389 registered voters, with 48.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.4%, a modest Republican lean of 2.6 percentage points.
